runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th on April 6 over 278m at Launceston behind Remember Tommy beaten 5 lengths (16.28) in a Special conditions race. Won at her only start from this draw. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Finished off last campaign with a seventh (26.90) in a GR 5 at this track. Makes return after a three-and-a-half months break. Has started fresh up three times for a win and a placing. Others appear better placed.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Launceston (17.16) in a Other, finishing a 11 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and five places from 10 starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Special conditions race on April 6 over 278m at Launceston behind Aariella's Girl, beaten 6 lengths (16.32). Hard to have this time.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 278m at Launceston. Not far away last time but this is a stiff test.

runners.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 3rd over 340m at this track beaten 5 lengths (19.69) behind Black Mouse in a Grade 5 on April 2. Looks a strong winning hope.
